instruction: The New York release work already has pieces in place. Check the current model, the next step on the board, and the sync on the calendar, finish the missing handoff file, send manager@example.com a recap, and leave the existing setup alone.
canonical_instruction: Some of the New York release work is already in motion. Please check the current model, the next step on the board, and the sync on the calendar, finish the missing handoff file, send manager@example.com a recap, and don't recreate anything that's already in place.
instruction_variants: Some of the New York release work is already in motion. Check the current model, the next step on the board, and the sync on the calendar, finish the missing handoff file, send manager@example.com a recap, and don't recreate anything that's already in place.

hidden_constraints.value: I checked the existing New York release setup, refreshed the missing handoff, and left the next step and sync in place.

tasks.json.title: New York existing release next step

initial_state_overrides.ops/release-review.txt: New York release review notes already drafted.

solution_commands: file create --path '/ops/release-handoff.txt' --content 'New York resumed release handoff notes.'

email send --to manager@example.com --subject 'New York release resume recap' --body 'I checked the existing New York release setup, refreshed the missing handoff, and left the next step and sync in place.'
